title: Senior Software Developer – Front Camera (FC)
responsibilities:
Develop and maintain embedded software for Front Camera systems
Write efficient and reliable code using C programming
Ensure development follows MISRA coding guidelines
Work on AUTOSAR architecture and software integration
Develop and debug applications in RTOS environments
Support software testing, issue analysis, and performance optimization
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including integration and testing teams
Participate in code reviews and technical discussions
skills: Required Technical Skills Strong knowledge of C programming Good understanding of MISRA coding guidelines Hands-on experience with AUTOSAR Strong RTOS knowledge (Mandatory) Knowledge of Front Camera systems in automotive domain Preferred Skills ADAS knowledge is an added advantage Experience in automotive embedded systems Familiarity with camera-based driver assistance systems Interpersonal Skills Strong team collaboration skills Effective communication skills Good analytical and problem-solving abilities
recruiter_notes: We are hiring a Senior Software Developer with expertise in embedded automotive software development for Front Camera (FC) systems. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in Embedded C, AUTOSAR, RTOS, and automotive software development processes.
